## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::WavesArrowUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        WavesArrowUp { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

water, sea, level, sound, hertz, wavelength, vibrate, high, tide, ocean, rising
